h0f588c65g285ag4f6cg9615gccf6a0d464b1: I know you've got questions. But let me ask you one first.
h6b179155g5042g4492gabeag3d20a6a4a71d: You ever want something so bad, you'd stop at nothing to get it?
h9fec99ceg2e54g4206gbe72gefa739361adf: I told you how Spike torched a village and yanked out my eye. I vowed to the Hells and Heavens that I'd make him pay.
hff5290fdgfa8bg496fga27fgb2fffa203f73: But... that wasn't the whole story.
h52fab13agc16cg49cbg8f9cg11407cd80402: A woman rose from the town's ashes. She called herself Mizora.
h9d572833gbe74g431fg8eacg414909fe06f5: My soul shivered as soon as her lips touched my ears. She promised I'd have my revenge.
hefdb81efg8dedg4c91gb321g1f1cc4da6fef: Mizora would forge me into a hero. I'd have the power to slay my every enemy, save their every victim. All in exchange for my endless devotion.
he6ce85f2g91d4g4560gaa07gbbb13cb4ab30: She only revealed her true form after I'd said 'yes'. A cambion - half human, half devil.
haa834bbdgbe22g4d5fgb308g0fc6fa367aea: You were right about the fake eye - it's a sending stone. Mizora can call on me whenever she wishes.
hc2eee2a1g5de4g4a1fgaa65gbc96c75c5b6a: Raphael, Mizora - the devils' game has but one end. My soul is now hers. In this life and beyond.
h0f21c556gc3abg4c7ag8cceg008e6bdf6d34: My soul became hers. In this life and beyond.
h80a5a966g9c39g49cbg880fg593d728d1adc: What power did this cambion grant?
hdd89beb2g1e70g4d08g9e93gc43a89bd2cdd: The flames and fury of the Nine Hells themselves. She showed me how to conjure fire and to command beasts.
h2188130cg8708g4815gb84ag8c5641cf65df: The more I craved, the more she promised. Balls of fire, festering clouds.
h9da66540g7052g4603g8ba8gdb0c9413129a: I went from spoiled brat to saviour. My way of avenging every blameless life taken. Slay enough monsters, save enough villages, and there could be... peace.
h1da4ada9g1d72g4a3fg9ccfg5849f62bfc07: What powers did Mizora grant you?
hce0ec11ege965g412bga7b4g57a8bd7bd483: The frontiers parted and the beasts cowered. A legend had come.
h3d00d04ag2513g40c0g9422gba8ca4273528: Peace, you say? How's that working out for you?
h776e4700g5c00g4d94gaa3bg5c00c740b700: I reckon you know the answer. There is no path to peace through the Hells, though I searched long for it.
hb9093d37gf1fag4f5cg8dddg070390a1ada5: I told Mizora I wanted out. We were still arguing when the squiddies snatched us both.
h0fcbc47eg3386g4bc7g8f63gbaff159bb34f: After the crash, goblins plucked her from her pod and - well, I reckon you know the rest.
h97b2a131gd9adg43a8g85c1gbf0eea47293c: I don't know what the drow want with Mizora. But she promised to break our bond if I save her.
h17b0acafg86c2g438egbf08gd9a1984b9310: I free her - and she frees me.
h94a521b2gf519g4defg9cb5gb73de7b17b96: *A strange sensation courses through you, and your companion's mind unfolds, secrets half-revealed.*
h47f1f5abgab66g467agb27fg418b21f6cf1d: You want out of the bargain? What changed your mind?
h1ff628a8gd73cg4c94gaf64gab29ec4559b5: Mizora demanded a price I was unwilling to pay.
h30387747gd3ecg4658g91a4g1b080f98f5a2: One I won't speak of. Not now, and not here.
h44505269gb67bg4c22gb2d4g79282bf2d183: You mentioned the true cost of the pact. What do you mean?
h457eba62g4d80g40dag8acag672cf18a6479: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h3c8d51f4gae8ag47d2gbaa1g68cde07a8caf: *A vision consumes you. You look at your hand to see it burning with flame.*
h3a25207egec0bg4312g983egde4d1240fe98: *You turn your head upward to see the face of a young boy, his eyes wide with fear.*
hd2d9d228gb553g47f1gb3bfg5a5ab759f174: Some ghosts belong to the past. Please - let them remain there.
hc0c5e7d7gef7bg42ecg9969g2424ebbd66e2: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hc00fadabg10edg4158gb245gf441ed519fe4: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
h69292daeg096eg454fg881dgc9de607e8412: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
he3d5873eg8bbcg42d2g80d0g86405a30ca10: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h493afb01gab88g4577g8e33g2a885e428aaf: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
he910cb07gcf28g41e2g9359g2bf2528f866c: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h3fb2d79cg9640g41fcg8a85g7728448ff59b: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
h7cf39102g8719g46a9g8dfag24ed9c30bc40: *You focus on the source of the power, but it is quiet and still. It needs to rest.*
h4018298dgca62g48b2ga6abg416880d43d58: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
h39f88453g06a3g42degacbcg010518dfdcf5: What becomes of this bargain if Mizora is killed?
h66d5cc53g0de3g4bdaga3bfge7ad4a94533a: The bargain is void if she's killed, near as I can tell. A nigh-impossible task, even for the Blade.
he089fc15g551eg4a04gaff0gcedf69b82349: If the drow slayed her, they'd do me a great favour. Or so I think on the darkest days.
h03468aa4gd47cg4b77g8232g99b7a918ad2b: But she still lives. They want something from her - Gods know what.
h25b4fea6g8b17g4e51g8886g0e946f9f0553: You are a liar and a fraud. I want you gone.
hde6a91c9g802dg4538gab4dgf4a5f90a554e: You're angry. I can't blame you. The Blade has rough edges.
hff015c08gbdccg4595gbb3cg52307c90f1bb: But I burn with more than the Hells' fires. A hero's heart beats in this chest.
hf1abb68fg099cg4810g8bbeg6023d30467dd: Together, I reckon we'll beat this bug. Apart? I hate to say, but - I'm not so sure.
hcedf6026gb550g4f5bga81agc2429b288dfa: You're right. I'd like to stick together.
he838062fg5fedg4145gba76g7b3c76847453: Onward then, and may we be free from the devils that might bind us...
h17450489g0451g41d8g9977g2ceddcb08b99: *You recall Raphael's infernal smirk, his goading voice.*
h20b49d02g5859g4d67g800fgff6a19a4a13f: ... and the devils that already do.
h4f94b8e5g3aebg4ee3g99e7gef6d4b91afc3: Onward then, and may we be free from the devils that might bind us.
hf795f9bcg1b1fg43c2g9a04g7a4a0636bf27: Then stay - for now. But I'm not forgetting this.
h38c4a58bg66cag4b5dgada4g770b6ba22052: I meant what I said. Go.
hfcab40b8g1630g4aa8gbad1g2c7303dce7d5: Then this is where we part ways.
hfc387497g4a22g4c31g8890ged06a8eb5eee: *The tadpole shivers as you hear Wyll's voice within your skull.*
h7ff868f0g11ddg41acgb658gf590b8988ce3: Godspeed, and may your journey be true.
h8f1c773egda05g4707gac02g3a50c9f98dfd: It's time we find Mizora and end this pact.
h4b31451agf4f4g469fg9249g9c0c4508aa6f: Thank you. Your loyalty means more than the whole of the realm's riches.
h58e7b45fg6539g4108gb308g7795db06ff9a: I don't know where she's gone to. But she promised to break our bond if I save her.
ha10d0dc3gfdc3g46ffga120g157520a8ffcc: Do you regret it? Giving in to her?
hce34c469g0751g4dbeg89c1g2b932d824ff2: I didn't at first. But then I came to know its true cost.
h83daf961g1065g4028ga0bbg9788859b5901: I took my first taste of victory, sweet as silkroot. And then another, and another.
h813af848g4ef4g4b64gbd36g87f186d4de93: Mizora would come after battle. Kiss my neck, touch me just so. Dangle just one more promise over my head. A game with no winner and no end.
h530a4faegd644g437ag87c3g631f940e734f: But came a time I wanted out. I was telling Mizora just that when the squiddies snatched us both.
h96fd46b5gcba2g4907gadb1gadab5259f13f: You're only who you are because of a devil - you don't deserve to be called a hero.
hac5f0a84gfd17g4f5dga732ge68638f83351: And a rich man doesn't deserve his wealth. But he'll hardly be quick to part with it.
h03499746g995bg489bgabb5g1e80df9b615c: My first taste of victory was sweet as silkroot. And one taste is never enough.
h979ea3b8g658fg465aga55fg65946cf750f3: So you were tricked? I wouldn't have stood for that - I'd have been furious.
h54326610g5c55g478bg9795g7e8c0878d741: And so I was - at first, anyway. Until I put her new powers to use.
hcb830f2ag9567g4a7eg824ag56d2f6606ef1: I called forth the flames and fury of the Nine Hells themselves. I could conjure fire and command beasts.
h2e581d98gaa65g46e0g8a33g7b05fac26262: A devil pact? What a stupid decision.
heda6ef47g1346g4151gb663g56942f3f2aea: A devil feeds on desperation. Or have you so quickly forgotten Raphael's honeyed tongue?
h66fad637ge1d4g4481gafafg83d83001976e: Mizora baited me forth with one power after another. She showed me how to conjure fire and to command beasts.
h1440200cgae92g48d7gbd6eg59df0784fc1a: You underestimate a devil's honeyed tongue.
he2d9919eg84bdg421fgb2a9g414ce8c7235b: I won't act like I wouldn't have accepted the offer myself.
h68194511g07e7g492fgaa91gc22fa65f181f: Then you make an easy victim for Raphael's honeyed tongue. The more you crave, the more a devil will promise.
h12840093gba0ag408fgb1deg1e509c77bb9a: Mizora baited me forth with one power after another. She showed me how to conjure fire and to command beasts.
h42d37b42g537dg44e9g9421gdb5f363e955c: And you might have thought yourself wise for it. I know I did.
hec55b09cgc9edg4f7bga0c1ge0af2043e080: Mizora raised me from spoiled brat to shining saviour.
ha074011egaedag43ccgb522g5bc76ba7f000: I reckoned if I slayed enough monsters, saved enough villages, I might bring peace.
h98e819cbg3ba9g43d9g8a3eg93fe8215a44c: A familiar tale. Patrons offer power - but there's always a high cost.
h7870dc4fg499fg4540gb89dg8e8fb95a92cc: 'Patron' seems too soft a word. 'Puppeteer', maybe.
he5d3042cg5b12g4fc1ga751g8245d89964f3: She raised me from spoiled brat to shining saviour. I reckoned if I slayed enough monsters, saved enough villages, I might bring peace.
h4970b1c3g2a8ag47dbga193g2c9711a4401f: She gave me a new eye - a sending stone to connect us, for calling on me whenever she so wished.
h167d5398g92eag49c9gbefcg47014aa27370: Spike and his goblin cronies torched a whole gods-damned village.
h41ffe457g7237g498ag88c9g8fd844dbcf2e: The bugger gouged out my eye and left us all to burn. I vowed to the Hells and Heavens that I'd make him pay.
he7e627a6g5c9ag42abgb644gba5552e42070: So rose a woman from the town's ashes. She called herself Mizora.
h55005bbfg16f9g4938g9d80g02b781613b58: No - I'm not as prone to dramatics as some.
h76e325d6gb5f6g4f9fg980egf4d5b46144e0: Then you don't know true desperation.
hbf536ba4g9d3eg4f3bg84cagfe033feed41d: I'd move the whole of the Material Plane were it to please my Queen.
h1ae83e5cg86b9g4ce9ga197g9d4a1599f957: I'll take that as a 'yes', then.
hb9b40ac9g565dg47edg8883gdc68ad9e17c5: Nod your head, thinking of winning Shar's approval.
h70076059gd121g4751gb30cgb994143130d6: Then you know that longing births desperation.
hba00c8beg30d5g4b46gaf34g0e2ff587b3b1: No, yours can wait. Who is this 'Mizora'?
